en_source: Even the aurora fades.\nCome back with a new stride.
In a fragile world,\nhaste shatters clarity before it can be found.
The moment slipped away.\nThe meaning did not.
Winter is patient.\nBe the same.
The sky kept moving.\nSo will you.
The story moves on.\nThe end is not yet.
The stars were there, watching.\nAgain.
Ice takes its time.\nNeither do you.
The sky kept moving.\nSo can you.
The north has learned to wait.\nSo should you.
This is an interlude\n—It’s not over.
Like drifting clouds,\ndon’t lose your flow—like a river.
The sound was near.\nThe distance was real.\nBut that moment can’t be saved.
You were closing in.\nOnly time wasn’t.
The world held to its rules.\nYou touched the edge of them.
You didn’t reach the treasure. \nBut the signal was real.
Nothing changed.\nOnly your position did.
It wasn’t luck.\nAlignment.
The moment slipped away,\nbut the record stayed.
You crossed fragile ground\nand left the horizon unbroken.
